message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should be in the centre and should be in the cheap price range
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 6 people at 16:00 on friday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a train. The train should go to stansted airport and should depart from cambridge
The train should arrive by 09:45 and should leave on saturday
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for the same group of people
Make sure you get the reference number
